title: How to get rid of the question numbers on a WorkForm
excerpt: How do I get rid of the numbered questions that show up on a workform? I have a form for our staff to submit requests along with details, dates, locations, contact info, ROI, etc. I don’t remember seeing the numbers ther…

posts.author: LaShaye (LaShaye Floyd)
posts.cookedHtml: How do I get rid of the numbered questions that show up on a workform? I have a form for our staff to submit requests along with details, dates, locations, contact info, ROI, etc. I don’t remember seeing the numbers there before so I must have inadvertently activated something. I just want the questions on the form to show, without each question being numbered. It makes it more intimidating for the user when they see a form they need to fill out and it’s numbered with 1-20. I think it’s just psychological, because they fill out the same questions on paper (questions on paper are not numbered). But an online form that visually shows you that you are about to fill out 20 questions and people get nervous - lol! We are trying to make things more efficient and move away from so much paper. Thanks!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Turn off the ‘Progress bar’ setting and that should remove the numbers
